calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Continued To Jul-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ivette M. Santella appeared via zoom for Diana Sullivan (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding service of the petition, that there is no confirmation that the address on the proof of service for Katherine Therese Rudd is a valid one, and that Ms. Santella to file Katherine's consent to the petition or waiver of notice prior to the next hearing. The matter is continued to July 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
